rulings.Case Title: JON DOE JR VS. CHARLES AKHIDNEOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Dismiss Pltf'S First Amended Complaint For Failure To Amen Within The Time Allowed By The Court
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014, line 1. RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint For Failure To Amend Within The Time Allowed By The Court Hearing Required for Defendant San Francisco Housing Authority's motion to dismiss Plaintiff's first amended complaint for failure to amend within the time allowed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MONICA D. KENNEY VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 25, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Defendant's Demurrer to the First Cause of Action for Breach of Contract is OVERRULED. Plaintiff has sufficiently pled the existence of a contract and breach of that contract. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the second cause of action for Fraud. Plaintiff shall plead, with specificity, facts regarding Plaintiff's justifiable reliance on Defendant's misrepresentations and the resulting damages. Defendant's Demurrer as to the Negligent Misrepresentation cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff should amend the facts regarding Defendant's duty and breach of that duty. Defendant's Demurrer as to the Negligence cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Defendant's demurrer as to the Negligent Infliction of Emotional Distress cause of action is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. See Patrick v. Alacer Corp., 167 Cal.App.4th 995, 1015 (2008). Finally, as to the Wrongful Eviction cause of action, Defendant's demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. = (501/REQ)
